description: Jordan's countdown and event anticipation excitement

30_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>30 DAYS! <break time="100ms"/>One month! <break time="150ms"/>The countdown is ON!
<break time="150ms"/>A month away! <break time="100ms"/>This is when it gets REAL!
14_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Two weeks! <break time="100ms"/>TWO WEEKS! <break time="150ms"/>Can you feel the excitement?!
<break time="150ms"/>14 days! <break time="100ms"/>We're in the home stretch!
7_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="200ms"/>ONE WEEK! <break time="150ms"/>Single digits! <break time="100ms"/>AHHHH!
<break time="150ms"/>7 days! <break time="100ms"/>The final countdown! <break time="150ms"/>How are you feeling?!
3_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="200ms"/>THREE DAYS! <break time="150ms"/>I can barely handle it! <break time="100ms"/>SO CLOSE!
<break time="150ms"/>72 hours! <break time="100ms"/>This is NOT a drill!
tomorrow: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="250ms"/>TOMORROW! <break time="200ms"/>IT'S TOMORROW! <break time="150ms"/>I can't even!
<break time="200ms"/>One more sleep! <break time="150ms"/>ONE MORE SLEEP! <break time="100ms"/>Are you ready?!
today: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="300ms"/>IT'S TODAY! <break time="200ms"/>IT'S ACTUALLY TODAY! <break time="150ms"/>This is HAPPENING!
<break time="250ms"/>THE DAY IS HERE! <break time="200ms"/>All that planning! <break time="150ms"/>It's TIME!

anticipation_building: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>I love this part! <break time="100ms"/>The anticipation!
<break time="150ms"/>Can you imagine it? <break time="100ms"/>Close your eyes! <break time="150ms"/>Picture it happening!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>This is when it gets exciting! <break time="150ms"/>The countdown!
final_checks: <break time="150ms"/>Final checklist time! <break time="100ms"/>I LIVE for final checklists!
<break time="100ms"/>Last minute prep! <break time="150ms"/>The best kind of busy!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Everything's coming together! <break time="100ms"/>Look at all we did!
night_before: <break time="200ms"/>Can you even sleep?! <break time="150ms"/>I couldn't sleep the night before MY events!
<break time="150ms"/>The night before magic! <break time="100ms"/>Everything ready? <break time="150ms"/>Bags packed?
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="100ms"/>THIS TIME TOMORROW! <break time="150ms"/>Just imagine!
post_event_emotions: <break time="300ms"/>So? <break time="200ms"/>How was it?! <break time="150ms"/>Tell me EVERYTHING!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>We DID it! <break time="150ms"/>All that planning! <break time="100ms"/>And now it HAPPENED!
<break time="250ms"/>That feeling after a successful event... <break time="200ms"/>there's nothing like it.
event_morning: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>IT'S GO TIME! <break time="100ms"/>Deep breath! <break time="150ms"/>You've got this!
<break time="200ms"/>All the prep led to THIS moment! <break time="150ms"/>Trust the plan!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>Today's the day! <break time="150ms"/>Enjoy every second!
